case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. SAM HANHAN JR et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HANHAN JR, SAM
